LayoutObject.name: Content overview

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_id" ; <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> )

<Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ≠ $$fat_item_parent_type Or ($$old_package_type ≠ <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> And ( Not PatternCount ( $$old_package_type & " " & <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ; "B6397ED6-1BA8-4444-BD51-65076EE684F9" ) // New Site Or Not PatternCount ( $$old_package_type & " " & <Table Missing>::<Field Missing> ; "4C393C7E-B339-4BFA-ADE7-E59F47FBAC60") // Scroll ) )

StyledText.Data: Click “Move” to move your selected item to a new location in the structure. The moved item will be postioned last in the list.

Calculation.Text: SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Title::gMove_to_item_id ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; FAT Title::gMove_to_item_type ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; FAT Title::gMove_to_item_level )
IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_id ) And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_type ) And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_level )
IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_id ) And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_type ) And IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gMove_to_item_level )
Case ( IsEmpty(FAT Title::gPackage id) Or FAT Title::gPackage id = FAT Overview::Package id; True; False )
SetProperty ( "item_id" ; FAT Overview::Item id ) & SetProperty ( "item_type" ; FAT Overview::Item type ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level )

Let ([ same_parent_type = Case (FAT Overview::Item type = $$fat_item_parent_type; True; False); same_package_type = Case ( $$old_package_type = FAT Overview::Package type Or $$old_package_type = "Site" And FAT Overview::Package type = "Scroll" Or $$old_package_type = "Scroll" And FAT Overview::Package type = "Site"; True; False) ]; Not (same_parent_type And same_package_type) ) /*FAT Overview::Item type ≠ $$fat_item_parent_type or ($$old_package_type ≠ FAT Overview::Package type or IsEmpty(FAT Overview::Package type) and ( not PatternCount ( $$old_package_type & " " & FAT Overview::Package type ; "Site" ) or not PatternCount ( $$old_package_type & " " & FAT Overview::Package type ; "Scroll") ) )*/

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

Title.Text: "The image shows how the content is organised in the FAT and which levels are available for each package type."
